solutions.title: Traceability is now achievable, All the way.
description: Edraak Systems offers complete traceability across shop floors. With our integrated systems, you can track fabric from source to final garment packing. RFID and barcode tags are used together to enable bundle-wise or individual piece-wise tracking.
Our Fabric & Apparel systems are being used across the industry. Get in touch to learn more.

visionSystem.title: Fabric Quality control using High Speed camera system
description: AI-powered, Ultra high-speed, High-precision, textile quality control
features: Superhuman inspection speed with Micro-level accuracy
High-resolution fabric imagery for advanced defect detection
Integrated with optimization engine for improved yield
Synchronized with cutting machines for efficient roll-making
Digital traceability and reduced reliance on manual inspection
Quick return on investment through enhanced operational efficiency
Working on Denim, Dyed & Greige Fabrics. Knits & Prints Coming Soon.

cameraIndustries.title: Camera Inspection in Other Industries
description: EVS (Edraak Vision System) provides reliable camera-based inspection for a wide range of industrial production lines. High-resolution cameras continuously scan products and surfaces to detect defects, damages, or inconsistencies in real time during production.
Used in pharma, food, electronics, and automotive, it quickly detects defects, reduces waste, and ensures consistent product quality.

subtabs.name: Greige Fabric
subtabs.content: EVS inspects greige (raw/unfinished) fabric straight from the loom, detecting common defects like knots, slubs, holes, broken yarns, thick/thin places, and uneven weave in real time. This prevents faulty greige from moving to dyeing, cuts down on rework, improves yield, and keeps weaving consistent.

subtabs.name: Dyed
subtabs.content: EVS checks dyed fabrics for issues that appear after coloring, such as uneven dyeing (patchy or cloudy shades), stains, dye marks, streaks, and weave faults visible post-dye. Running at full production speed, it flags problems instantly for marking or removal, helping maintain uniform color quality and avoid buyer rejections.

subtabs.name: Denim
subtabs.content: EVS specializes in denim inspection, identifying streaks, holes, broken yarns, slubs, neps, barre marks, and finishing defects on the fly. In busy denim lines, it increases first-quality output, shortens manual checks, lowers rejection rates, and helps meet strict buyer standards.

subtabs.name: On-Loom
subtabs.content: EVS on-loom inspection monitors fabric quality directly during weaving to detect defects at the earliest stage. Real-time alerts help operators react immediately, reducing downstream losses, rework, and machine downtime.

subtabs.name: Apparel Inspection
subtabs.content: EVS apparel inspection checks stitched garments for visual defects, stitching issues, shade mismatches, and labeling errors before dispatch. It supports consistent final quality and faster quality assurance decisions.

subtabs.name: Fabric Quality Control
subtabs.content: The Fabric Quality Control system streamlines quality control by logging faults and guiding inspections, feeding data into an optimization engine that creates the best cutting plans. This reduces B-grade fabric and boosts efficiency by up to 0.4%.

subtabs.name: Cutting plan optimization
subtabs.content: By utilizing advanced algorithms and artificial intelligence, Edraak’s cutting plan optimization minimizes fabric wastage and increases efficiency. This ensures that cutting plans are executed with precision, resulting in reduced operational costs and higher quality output.

subtabs.name: Width measurement
subtabs.content: Edraak’s automatic width sensing device continuously captures fabric width data, triggering alarms when deviations occur, ensuring accurate width without production stops.

subtabs.name: Labeling system
subtabs.content: Edraak's automatic labeling system marks fabric faults during production, providing essential data for efficient panel cutting without halting operations.

subtabs.name: Production tracking
subtabs.content: Edraak’s barcode scanning system provides seamless fabric tracking from input to output, resolving fabric length discrepancies and optimizing material use. High-speed scanners and digital meters log precise lengths, monitor fabric consumption, and alert teams to real-time discrepancies. This ensures accurate costing, minimizes waste, and simplifies final product verification, aligning operations for efficiency and quality assurance.

subtabs.name: Total quality management
subtabs.content: Edraak’s Factory on Phone integrates 7-0 quality control for needlepoint precision, reducing rework, tracking missing garments, and achieving cost savings while boosting efficiency.

subtabs.name: Smart sewing system
subtabs.content: Edraak's Smart Sewing System automates planning, tracking, and wages, minimizing manual errors and enhancing productivity. The RFID scanner, integrated with the traffic light system, enhances visual management.

subtabs.name: Smart wash monitoring
subtabs.content: The Smart Wash Monitoring system tracks machine performance, including power and water usage, downtime, and OEE, ensuring maximum efficiency.

subtabs.name: Machine care pro
subtabs.content: Machine Care Pro provides real-time monitoring for industrial machinery, ensuring preventive and corrective maintenance to optimize equipment performance and reduce costs.

technology.title: Technology Domains
technology.description: Camera Vision, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, RFID, IoT, Machine Learning, Big Data, Embedded Systems, Automations

items.title: Fabric Cutting Optimization - Wastage Reduction
items.description: Using Artificial Intelligence to plan the cutting of the fabric based on the distribution of the faults, this helps avoid any short pieces & excessive fabric waste.

items.title: Spectrophotometer
items.description: A spectrometer measures light across different wavelengths to analyze color and material composition. It helps detect variations in color or chemical properties, enabling precise quality control and consistent production in industrial processes.

items.title: Real Time Width Monitoring
items.description: Fabric width data is crucial in fabric production, aiding in both shrinkage control and final quality assurance. The system streamlines the width measurement process, saving time and effectively adding an extra day's worth of production each month.

items.title: Production Tracking in Apparel/Stitching
items.description: Calculating real-time production capacity in planning lines is challenging with simultaneous operations, styles, and personnel, making floor visibility difficult. Edraak accurately enables precise tracking, wage calculation, and production planning.

items.title: Fabric Tracking and Seam Detection
items.description: Using high speed vision technologies, Edraak Systems offers cutting edge solution to detect seams and barcodes from moving on any processing machines and at any speed. This ensures traceability and accurate cost calculations.

items.title: Data Analysis & Business Analytics
items.description: Gathering data from various sources, including existing and proprietary ones, to develop a more powerful decision-making engine.

items.title: Robotics
items.description: Robotics-enabled automation supports precise, repeatable industrial operations and integrates with vision and data systems for smarter execution.

items.title: Visual Fault Detection
items.description: Ultra highspeed camera inspection system for Woven and Non-Woven fabrics.

items.title: Fabric Color Sensors
items.description: Spectrometers, installed on your machines helps you identify color and shade variation issues at the fabric stage.

items.title: Sewing Traceability & QC
items.description: Bundle Flow or Single piece, we got you covered. Equipped with latest IoT device installed on each machines. We can track your production while in production using RFIDs or Barcodes.

items.title: Fabric Width Sensing
items.description: Use Highspeed cameras to detect fabric width with pin point accuracy and control parameters of your machine in real-time.

items.title: Fabric Traceability
items.description: linked with digital encoders, Ultra High Speed Scanners detect seam optically, also the Barcode in real-time. Giving you the most accurate fabric meters for departmental transfer. Energy Consumption data can also be linked.

items.title: Digital Data Loggers
items.description: Industrial grade digital data loggers to allow users to input data manually and also assisted with automation data.

items.title: Automated Production Tracking and Data Logging
items.excerpt: Automated production management by replacing manual data entry, improving accuracy and reducing operational costs

items.title: AI in Cutting Plan Optimization
items.excerpt: A new fabric cutting algorithm reduced wastage, cut costs, and improved real-time traceability, providing a more efficient and paperless workflow.

items.title: Realtime Process Quality Control
items.excerpt: A new solution automated with measurement, speeding up quality control, improving accuracy, and enabling real-time, paperless operations.

items.title: Quality Assurance via Business Intelligence
items.excerpt: Real-time analytics, streamlined decision-making, and improved efficiency by providing easy-to-use, data-driven insights.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
content: Throughout this site, there are several areas where we collect information, including name, title, company name, address, telephone number, fax number, e-mail address, department, industry, country, city, state, and zip code. In some instances, we may verify or combine this information with data that has been previously obtained. This information, where noted, will not be saved or recorded except for EDRAAK SYSTEMS' own use.
We compile and use this information to complete transactions and keep our customers apprised of new products, product enhancements, and services.

The information we collect is never sold, rented, leased, traded, swapped, marketed, exchanged, bartered, distributed, or disclosed in any way. We don’t like to receive junk mail or spam and know our customers don’t either.
We also want to make sure the information we have collected is up-to-date and accurate. If there are inaccuracies please e-mail the correct information to mail@edraaksystems.com

termsAndConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
content: Acceptance of Terms and Conditions: The following are terms of a legal agreement between any user of this web site ('User') and Edraak Systems. By accessing, browsing or using this web site (the 'Site') the User agrees to be bound by these access terms and conditions. The material provided on or accessed by way of this Site is protected by law, including without limitation, United States copyright laws and international treaties. This Site is controlled or operated by Edraak Systems from its offices in Lahore Pakistan.
A User who accesses this Site from anywhere does so on his/her own initiative and is separately responsible for compliance with any applicable local law on internet usage and web site access.

Information on this Site may contain inaccuracies or typographical errors, and Edraak Systems assumes no liability for and reserves the right to correct such inaccuracies or errors at any time. Edraak Systems may also make changes, updates and improvements to this Site or these access terms and conditions, at any time without notice.

Links to Third-Party Web Sites: This Site may contain links to third-party web sites. Such linked websites are not under the control of Edraak Systems, and Edraak Systems assumes no responsibility for the contents of any such linked web site, any link contained in a linked web site, any changes or updates to such linked web sites, or any material transmitted or downloaded from any linked web site. Edraak Systems is providing these links to third-party web sites solely as a convenience to User, and the inclusion of such links do not imply endorsement by Edraak Systems of those third-party web sites.

Use Restrictions: The copyright in all material (including still and moving images) provided, maintained or accessible on this Site is held by Edraak Systems or by the original creator of the material or its assignee. Except as stated herein, none of this material may be copied, reproduced, distributed, republished, downloaded, displayed, posted or transmitted in any form or by any means, including without limitation, by electronic, mechanical, photocopying or other recording means, without the prior written permission of Edraak Systems or the appropriate copyright owner. Users also may not, without prior written permission from Edraak Systems, 'mirror' any material contained in this Site, perform 'deep links' or use any Trademark as a metatag relative to any other web site.

Disclaimer of Warranty: THE MATERIALS MAINTAINED ON OR ACCESSED BY WAY OF THIS SITE ARE PROVIDED 'AS IS' WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION, ALL IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, NON-INFRINGEMENT OR OTHER VIOLATION OF RIGHTS. Edraak Systems DOES NOT WARRANT OR MAKE ANY REPRESENTATIONS REGARDING THE USE, VALIDITY, ACCURACY, OR RELIABILITY OF, OR THE RESULTS OF ANY USE OF, OR OTHERWISE RESPECTING, THE MATERIALS MAINTAINED ON OR ACCESSED BY WAY OF THIS SITE OR ANY WEB SITE LINKED TO THIS SITE.

Limitation of Liability: UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCE (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE AND TO THE FULLEST EXTEND PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW) WILL Edraak Systems BE LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, PUNITIVE OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES (INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION, BUSINESS INTERRUPTION, DELAYS, LOSS OF DATA OR PROFIT) ARISING OUT OF THE USE OR THE INABILITY TO USE THE MATERIALS MAINTAINED ON OR ACCESSED BY WAY OF THIS SITE EVEN IF Edraak Systems HAS BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES. IF USE OF SUCH MATERIALS RESULTS IN THE NEED FOR SERVICING, REPAIR OR CORRECTION OF USER EQUIPMENT OR DATA, USER ASSUMES ANY COSTS ASSOCIATED THEREWITH.

Applicable Laws: Any claim relating to this Site or the use of this Site and the materials contained or accessed by way thereof are governed exclusively by the laws of the State of Texas, United States of America, without regard to conflict of law principles.
Privacy Statement: This statement explains our practices regarding personal information you may supply to us when visiting an Edraak Systems web site.

Personal Information: Normally, you can visit a Edraak Systems web site without revealing any information about yourself. However, there are times when we may request information from you. Also, some web site functions may require you to complete a registration form. Most information requested will relate to the company that you work for or represent. However, sometimes we may request information specifically about you.

We may ask you to voluntarily provide us with demographic information for market research, as well as information about your interests and experiences with our products or that of your company or employer. Occasionally, we may share provided information and e-mail addresses with our affiliates and other reputable organizations whose products or services we think you may find interesting.

Information Security: We conduct our business in compliance with applicable laws on data privacy protection and data security and take reasonable precautions to keep all information obtained from our online visitors secure against unauthorized access and use. If needed to conduct electronic commerce, provided credit card numbers will be used only for payment processing and will not be disclosed to any other third parties.

Other Web Sites and Public Forums: Our web sites may contain links to other third-party web sites. Edraak Systems is not responsible for the privacy practices of those web sites. We also may make available forums, message boards and news groups to our customers. Please remember that any information disclosed in using those facilities may become public information or may be subject to separate disclosure and use rules, and you should exercise caution when deciding whether to disclose personal information.

Cookies - What is a Cookie?: A cookie is either a small text file that is stored on your hard drive or some information that is stored in memory until you close your browser. Edraak Systems web site may save information on your system in the form of cookies to provide you a more personalized browsing experience, access to a secure implementation, or to better track usage of Edraak Systems web site.

Cookies - What is its purpose?: Edraak Systems web site may allow you to register or choose personalization options so that you can be directed dynamically to information on the web pages that suits your interest. By using a cookie, the web site automatically can read your preferences and customize the web pages without any action on your part. Other areas of Edraak Systems web site may require you to login. In those cases, your username may be stored in a cookie so that the username field automatically can be filled in for you on subsequent visits. If you set your browser not to accept these cookies, your access to or use of certain pages or functionality on Edraak Systems web site may be restricted. Please refer to the informational web site for the Internet browser that you use for more information on cookies.

General Terms and Conditions of Sale: These general terms and conditions of sale only apply to purchases of Edraak Systems branded products and related services made directly from Edraak Systems. Purchases made from appointed distributors or other independent resellers will be subject to terms and conditions of sale as may be separately established by each such distributor or reseller, which will in no event be binding upon Edraak Systems unless otherwise expressly agreed to. However, Edraak Systems extends its standard Manufacturer’s Warranty to customers purchasing Edraak Systems branded products and related services from their local authorized Edraak Systems distributor. Such Manufacturer’s Warranty is in lieu of all other warranties, which are expressly disclaimed.

General: These general terms and conditions of sale (along with any associated written specification, quotation and/or supplemental terms and conditions provided by Seller) exclusively will govern the sale or licensing by Seller of all goods and services (including without limitation, hardware, firmware and software products, training, programming, maintenance, engineering, and services – hereinafter, 'Products') furnished to Buyer hereunder, whether such sale or licensing is effected by paper-based transactions or via facsimile or other forms of electronic data interchange ('EDI') or electronic commerce, and represents the entire agreement between Buyer and Seller with respect thereto. Buyer’s receipt or acceptance of delivery of any of the Products ordered or purchased hereunder will constitute its acceptance of these terms and conditions. No addition or modification to these terms and conditions will be binding on Seller unless agreed to in writing signed by an authorized representative at Seller’s headquarters. Seller objects to and rejects other terms and conditions that may be proposed by Buyer or that appear on or are referenced in Buyer’s purchase order or requisition that are in addition to or otherwise not consistent with the terms and conditions set forth or referenced herein.
